Appearances:
Plaintiff Rita Vense Kong is present.
Attorney Jeffery P. Woo appears for the plaintiff.
Defendant Vicente A Soto is present.
Attorney Michael Schreiber, Esq. appears for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502-B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of MAY-12-2014 is vacated. (D501/JPT)
